title: Time Go Up, Hunger Go Down
description: Your hunger bar will go down slowly even if you aren't moving.
body:
Your hunger bar will go down slowly even if you aren't moving.

(In regular Minecraft it won't change unless you move)

I guess it's good for realism or if you want afk farms to go bye-bye.

You lose 1 hunger point every 60 seconds or 0.01665 hunger per second, this number can be changed.
